concerns.text: Acceptance Scenario 3 specifies '≥ 95% of bugs (≥ 47 bugs) have valid correctness labels recorded' — this is a specific empirical value that should be deferred per the spec template guidance ('Planning docs state *what* will be measured... defer specific empirical values... to the implementation/research phase').

FR-006 specifies BLEU similarity only, but the idea explicitly mentions 'BLEU/ROUGE against human-written patch notes'. This is minor under-reach — ROUGE was explicitly listed as an alternative metric in the idea's methodology sketch.
